name: Toasted Sesame Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Sesame seeds, toasted and hulled
Up to 3 tsp Sea salt – to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the sesame seeds about 1/8 inch thick on a flat baking pan or dish and bake for 12-18 minutes at 300°F.
2. Stir once or twice and remove from oven when lightly browned and toasted.
3. Blend the toasted seeds, 1/4 cup at a time in the blender until ground fine.
4. Add all remaining ingredients to the blender and liquefy.
5. Heat in a saucepan on medium-low heat, stirring frequently, until thickened and hot throughout.
6. Serve over vegetables, grain, burgers, casseroles, or pasta.
7. Keeps refrigerated for 6-8 days.
